chosen_action.title: Preserve AI Saying as a truthful feedback-form publisher target during the hold window

why_this_action.summary: The short review window is still active until 2026-05-26T08:57:00, so another live outbound action would blur measurement. The highest-leverage same-run move was to repair stale discovery truth so the scheduled post-hold publisher handoff keeps the real AI Saying feedback-form path instead of downgrading it back to a vague website route.
supporting_reasons: distribution_lane_latest.md and marketing_execution_board_latest.md already hold manual delivery until 2026-05-26T08:57:00
Earlier 2026-05-26 packet/follow-through logs said AI Saying was a feedback-form target, but primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json had drifted back to a generic website-only description
AI Saying exposes a public feedback widget on the article page that posts to /api/feedback with visible content/contact/page_url fields and Allow: POST

result.summary: Patched feedback-form detection so Submit Feedback widgets count, added regression coverage, regenerated the primary-repo-flat discovery and packet artifacts, and verified that AI Saying now stays surfaced as a feedback-form contact path with the article page as the first channel to try after the hold clears.

runtime_checks: primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json now marks AI Saying recommended_next_step as public feedback-form contact path is now identified
primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet_latest.md now points First channel to try at https://aisaying.net/knowledge/article/ai-coding-tools-comparison-matrix
openclaw cron list --json still shows marketing-measurement-hold-release job 217831be-05ae-4737-b8fa-9dc3026ff392 scheduled for 2026-05-26T08:57:00.000Z
